title: Health Care System - Canada.ca
content:
On the Health Canada Web site, each navigation section (listed on the left-hand side of the screen) has its own Contact Us page. To find contact information for topics other than the Health Care System, view the Main Contact Us page .
Choose any of these topics for contact information:
- Health Care Policy Contribution Program
- Health Human Resources
- Health Human Resources Strategy Mailing List
The Canada Health Act Division responds to enquiries regarding the Canada Health Act and health insurance issues from the public, government departments, stakeholder organizations and the media.
For information beyond what is available in the Canada Health Act section of this Web site and in the Canada Health Act - Frequently Asked Questions section, please contact the Canada Health Act Division

## Health Care Policy Contribution Program
Contact the Health Care Policy Contribution Program .

## Health Human Resources
Contact Health Human Resources staff .

## Health Human Resources Strategy Mailing List
This listserv is a free bilingual, self-service messaging system that is open to the public while concurrently protecting subscribers from other subscribers who are unable to view their e-mail addresses. The listserv notifies subscribers whenever new HHR Strategy information is posted on the Web site: www.health-human-resources.ca .
Contact the Office of Nursing Policy
Contact the Primary and Continuing Health Care Division
